subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! Thy servant, Mihdí, standeth before Thine exalted threshold, supplicating the celestial Kingdom and imploring aid from “the strong support”
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک مهدی قام تلقاء عتبک العالیه و یتضرع الی ملکوت الرحمانیه و یرجوا التااید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
